title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: What role does language play in people's lives?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two roles of language are the most significant in people's lives.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about the role language plays in people's lives.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two roles are the most significant.
